title: Blade's Easier Golden Apples
description: Makes the Golden Apple Recipe Easier & Returns the Ability to Craft the Enchanted Golden Apple
body:
### Summary:
Modifies Minecraft's Recipes, changing the requirement of 8 gold ingots to just 8 golden Nuggets.

In addition, it restores the ability to craft the Enchanted Golden Apple using just 4 gold blocks.

## Recipes:
